title: Hopping Girl Kohane EX
description:
The authentic action-puzzle game Hopping Girl Kohane EX is now available on Steam!

With simple controls, aim to clear over 100 stages.

"Hopping Girl Kohane EX" is an action-puzzle game where players control Kohane riding a pogo stick as she makes her way to the goal.

Enjoy deep, skill-based action with easy controls.

The key to the game is a set of mysterious stamps with a variety of special effects.

Use the stamps wisely, rack up points, and go for a high score!

【Stages】There are over 100 playable stages in total!

New stages have been added—and they even come with brand-new mechanics!?

From beginner-friendly levels to brutally challenging ones, there’s a huge variety of satisfying stages to conquer.

【Championship Mode】“Championship Mode” is available from the start, but:

・No continues

・Default costume abilities only

・Extremely high difficulty

Because of this, we strongly recommend taking it on after clearing all 100 stages.

【Costumes】Collect Kohane’s outfits and enjoy playing in different styles.

Costumes can be unlocked by clearing stages or purchased at the Tobiko Shop using in-game coins.

【Score Titles】Clearing a stage isn’t the end!

Each stage features its own set of score titles.

Earn higher scores to unlock higher-ranking titles.

Keep challenging yourself again and again to aim for the top title.

【Rankings】Each stage features both Score Rankings and Clear Time Rankings.

Compete with players from around the world and climb the leaderboards.

Streaming and Video ContentIndividuals and organizations are welcome to stream, record, and share gameplay videos of this game, provided that they comply with our guidelines.

You may also monetize gameplay videos of this game using the monetization features provided by video-sharing platforms.

However, the creation or distribution of content that includes defamation, harassment, or material that violates public order and morals is prohibited.

D-O Inc. assumes no responsibility for any damages, disputes, or other issues arising from the streaming, recording, or distribution of gameplay content.
description_short: A full-fledged action puzzle game that’s a blast to play with just one control—now back and better than ever in “EX” form!! With simple controls, take on over 100 stages and race for the goal!
